_comment: Recorded Apple OSS versions for .github/workflows/apple-oss-watch.yml. The workflow compares live releases/tags against this file and opens an issue when they differ; it never commits here (no auto-commit loops). A maintainer updates this file to acknowledge a release.
_init_note: Initialized 2026-07-12 with null placeholders: api.github.com was unreachable from the audit sandbox (egress proxy returned 403 for non-session repositories), so current versions could not be fetched at generation time. First workflow run will report all four as new — copy its 'current' values into latest_known to baseline.
